name: Easter White Chocolate and Lime Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate.
2. Halve the lady fingers lengthwise.
3. Line the bottom and sides of an 8 1/2-inch springform pan with ladyfingers, making sure the rounded sides are facing out.
4. Beat the cream cheese on the lowest speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Blend in the sugar and melted white chocolate; mix well.
6. Sprinkle the gelatine over the lime juice in a saucepan. Let stand 5 minutes to soften.
7. Stir the mixture over low heat until the gelatine is dissolved.
8. Blend the warm gelatine and lime peel into the cheese mixture.
9. Fold the cheese mixture into the whipped cream.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Chill for at least 3 hours.
12. Garnish with strawberries and lime slices before serving.
